definition: Deterministic market state emitted from circuit-breaker and stress control orchestration.
update_cadence: Every 60 seconds or immediately on transition
publication_rule: Publish state enum, reason code, affected instruments, and next review time.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish internal anti-gaming thresholds or operator-only incident notes.

definition: Current vault backstop capital and utilization snapshot in settlement currency.
source_system: C1 vault ledger and exposure engine
publication_rule: Publish total, committed margin, available backstop, and utilization ratio.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish wallet addresses, signer identities, or internal treasury routing.

definition: Per-instrument signed directional imbalance between long and short open interest.
publication_rule: Publish signed ratio, long notional, short notional, and net bias.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish participant-level positions or market-maker inventory identities.

definition: Per-instrument open interest exposure snapshot and recent growth velocity.
publication_rule: Publish contracts, gross notional, and 1-hour velocity percent.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish account concentration, position ownership, or internal order identifiers.

definition: Per-instrument live leverage band after governance limits and stress controls are applied.
publication_rule: Publish min leverage, max leverage, governance ceiling, and named drivers.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish proprietary weighting constants or hidden anti-manipulation buffers.

definition: Per-instrument funding output used to transfer cost between long and short positioning.
publication_rule: Publish current hourly rate, projected 8-hour equivalent, settlement interval, and sign convention.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish private coefficient calibration, maker routing, or quote attribution.

definition: Per-instrument realized volatility and acceleration values used by leverage and stress controls.
source_system: A3 index outputs plus D1 stress metrics
publication_rule: Publish 1-hour realized volatility, 24-hour realized volatility, and acceleration.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish source-level raw tick history or proprietary smoothing coefficients.

definition: Per-instrument active control band after spread, cap, and stress multipliers are applied.
publication_rule: Publish stress level, effective minimum spread, position cap, open-interest cap, and funding multiplier band.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish market-maker protection logic, queue-priority rules, or internal escalation thresholds.

definition: Operator-visible state enum for the market or affected instruments.
update_cadence: Every 60 seconds or immediately on transition
publication_rule: Publish exact enum value from the approved state list.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish manual operator commentary.

definition: Machine-readable cause for the current market status.
update_cadence: Every 60 seconds or immediately on transition
publication_rule: Publish concise reason code suitable for downstream UI and audit use.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish internal runbook instructions.

definition: Total vault capital denominated in USDC.
publication_rule: Publish full number with standard decimal precision.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish underlying wallet segmentation.

definition: Committed margin divided by total vault capital.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish private reserve-buffer formulas.

definition: Signed ratio of net notional to gross notional for an instrument.
One-hour percent change in gross notional open interest.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish hidden lookback variants.

definition: Maximum leverage currently allowed for new exposure on the instrument.
publication_rule: Publish effective maximum leverage after all live adjustments.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish intermediate model coefficients.

definition: Current hourly funding rate in basis points.
publication_rule: Publish signed basis-point value and settlement direction convention.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish internal clamp coefficients.

definition: Rate of change in short-horizon realized volatility.
publication_rule: Publish the first derivative used for stress signaling.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish unreleased stress thresholds.

definition: Current minimum spread floor enforced for quoting and matching protection.
publication_rule: Publish active spread floor in basis points.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish market-maker specific quote protections.

definition: Maximum single-position notional allowed under the active risk state.
source_system: C1 caps plus D2 stress responses
publication_rule: Publish the active notional cap per instrument.
redaction_boundary: Do not publish participant-specific overrides because none are allowed.
